channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Network automation challenges are dampening success rates
item.description: Network automation technology promises operational efficiencies and reduced security risks for enterprise businesses, which makes it seem like an obvious investment area for IT leaders.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: SD-WAN, SASE outpace MPLS investments: survey
item.description: A new report from SASE vendor Aryaka highlights the increasing convergence of specific networking and security technologies as well as the trend among enterprise businesses to drive collaboration across network and security teams.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump Media, Reddit surge despite questionable profit prospects, taking on the 'meme stock' mantle
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Reddit and Trump Media are the first notable social media companies to begin trading publicly in the last five years. They're also, thanks to the rabid reception among investors coupled with the companies' fuzzy profit outlooks, the latest meme stocks.
item.dc:creator: AP, KRON4

item.title: Beware the gap between security readiness and confidence levels, Cisco warns
item.description: Security readiness among enterprises has dropped in the past year, while the confidence level of many organizations is up – a trend that doesn’t portend a good outcome.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Kansas moves to join Texas and other states in requiring porn sites to verify people's ages
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — Kansas is poised to require pornography websites to verify visitors are adults, a move that would follow Texas and a handful of other states despite concerns about privacy and how broadly the law could be applied.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: New Zealand joins the US and the UK in alleging it was targeted by China-backed cyberespionage
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Hackers linked to the Chinese government launched a state-sponsored operation that targeted New Zealand's Parliament in 2021, the country's security minister said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: AP, KRON4
